name: Farmers - Smart Greenhouse Management
description: A comprehensive IoT-enabled Flutter mobile application for precision agriculture, enabling real-time greenhouse monitoring, automated control systems, and AI-powered farming insights through AWS cloud integration. [attached_file:1]
largeDescription:
Farmers is an advanced IoT-driven agricultural management platform built with Flutter and AWS services, designed to revolutionize precision farming through real-time greenhouse automation and intelligent monitoring. Leveraging Clean Architecture principles and AWS cloud infrastructure, the application empowers farmers with complete control over their greenhouse operations through mobile technology. Key features include:

	• Multi-Greenhouse IoT Integration: Connect and manage multiple ESP32-based IoT devices per greenhouse with secure MQTT communication over AWS IoT Core, monitoring temperature, humidity, soil moisture, pH levels, and nitrogen content in real-time.
	• Automated Climate Control: Remote device control via MQTT with automated irrigation based on soil moisture thresholds, configurable target parameters, and real-time command execution for ventilation and temperature regulation.
	• AI-Powered Agricultural Insights: Integrated AWS Lex conversational AI chatbot for farming queries and Perplexity AI for advanced fertilizer recommendations based on crop stage, sensor readings, VPD calculations, and evapotranspiration metrics.
	• Comprehensive AWS Integration: Full-stack AWS implementation with Cognito authentication, AppSync GraphQL for real-time data sync, DynamoDB for time-series sensor data, S3 storage, and offline-first capabilities with automatic conflict resolution.
	• Advanced Analytics Dashboard: Real-time data visualization with charts, historical trend analysis, crop stage tracking, weather API integration with 7-day forecasts, and air quality monitoring.

Built with BLoC state management, GetIt dependency injection, and Isar local database, Farmers demonstrates expertise in Flutter mobile development, AWS cloud architecture, IoT system integration, and building production-ready agricultural technology solutions. [attached_file:1]

name: Aqua Analytics
description: A Django-based web application for real-time monitoring, analysis, and control of water management systems through IoT sensor integration and interactive dashboards. [conversation_history:1]
largeDescription:
Aqua Analytics is a comprehensive IoT-enabled water management system built with Django and Python. It provides end-to-end monitoring and control capabilities for water-related infrastructure through real-time sensor data collection and intelligent analytics. The application enables users to:

	• Monitor Real-Time Data: Interactive dashboards visualize live sensor readings from ESP32-based IoT devices via HTTP protocols.
	• Analyze Historical Trends: Statistics and insights pages deliver historical data analysis for informed decision-making.
	• Manage Alerts: Automated alert system for critical events and anomalies in water systems.
	• Control Motors: Remote motor control functionality for automated water management.

With a modular frontend architecture featuring reusable components and a robust Django backend, Aqua Analytics demonstrates expertise in IoT integration, full-stack web development, and building scalable monitoring solutions for smart infrastructure applications. [conversation_history:1]

name: Capyapy
description: A full ecosystem for instant backend API generation and visual management of mock API projects, combining a Spring Boot backend generator with a modern Flutter web dashboard. [conversation_history:1]
largeDescription:
Capyapy is a rapid backend generation platform designed to streamline full-stack development by automatically creating production-ready Spring Boot APIs from declarative definitions while providing a rich Flutter web dashboard to manage projects, models, and endpoints. Capyapy instantly provides a running backend service with CRUD endpoints for defined entities, allowing frontend developers to focus on UI and integration instead of boilerplate backend code. Core capabilities include:

	• Instant API Generation: Define your data models and receive a fully functional Spring Boot backend with CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete) exposed as REST endpoints in minutes.
	• Zero Boilerplate: Skip manual backend setup, database configuration, and repetitive controller code—Capyapy handles API wiring, routing, and data handling for rapid prototyping.
	• Visual Project Management: A Flutter-based dashboard lets you create, view, edit, and delete projects, configure data models, manage endpoints, and explore usage analytics through a responsive web UI.
	• Modern Frontend Architecture: Implements BLoC state management, GoRouter-based navigation, and clean architecture separation across data, domain, and presentation layers in the dashboard.
	• Frontend-First Development: Perfect for hackathons, MVPs, and fast iterations where frontend teams need working APIs immediately without deep backend knowledge.

Capyapy demonstrates expertise in Spring Boot backend automation together with advanced Flutter web development, showcasing the ability to build developer tools that accelerate the software development lifecycle end-to-end. [conversation_history:1]

name: Shah's Bakery - Microservices Platform
description: A comprehensive Spring Boot microservices platform for bakery operations featuring event-driven architecture, service discovery, API gateway, and independent scalable services for e-commerce management.
largeDescription:
Shah's Bakery is an enterprise-grade microservices platform built with Spring Boot and Spring Cloud, designed to address the complex operational challenges of modern bakery businesses including inventory management, order coordination, customer engagement, and payment workflows [web:31][web:34]. The platform follows domain-driven design principles with each microservice focused on a specific business capability, enabling independent development, deployment, and scaling [web:30]. Core capabilities include:

	• Comprehensive Microservice Ecosystem: Eight specialized services including API Gateway for routing and security, Auth Service for OAuth2/JWT authentication, Cart Service for session management, Eureka Server for service discovery, and dedicated Order, Payment, Product, and Notification services [attached_file:1][web:30].
	• Event-Driven Architecture with Kafka: Currently integrating Apache Kafka for real-time inter-service communication, enabling event streaming for OrderPlaced, PaymentConfirmed, and inventory updates with event replayability and fault tolerance [web:26][web:27][web:29].
	• Enterprise Scalability: Services scale independently based on load with horizontal scaling support, circuit breaker patterns via Resilience4j, and failure isolation for high resilience [web:29][web:32].
	• Advanced Technology Stack: Leverages Spring Cloud Netflix Eureka for service registry, Spring Cloud OpenFeign for declarative REST clients, Redis caching, Quartz Scheduler for campaigns, AWS SNS and Twilio for multi-channel notifications, and PostgreSQL with Spring Data JPA [attached_file:1][web:30].
	• Production-Ready Infrastructure: Containerized with Docker and Docker Compose, comprehensive monitoring via Spring Boot Actuator, OpenAPI/Swagger documentation, and JUnit 5 with Testcontainers for testing [attached_file:1][web:30].

The platform demonstrates expertise in microservices architecture, distributed systems design, Spring Cloud ecosystem, event-driven patterns, and building scalable e-commerce solutions with modern DevOps practices [web:31][web:34].

name: CapyVerse CLI
description: A powerful native CLI tool for seamless Java version management built with GraalVM, featuring zero dependencies and cross-platform support for Windows, Linux, and macOS. [conversation_history:1]
largeDescription:
CapyVerse CLI is a native command-line version manager designed to streamline Java development workflows by enabling instant switching between different JDK versions. Built with Java 21 and compiled to native executables using GraalVM Native Image, it delivers lightning-fast startup times and runs without requiring any JVM, JDK, or external dependencies pre-installed. Key capabilities include:

	• Zero-Dependency Execution: Runs as a standalone native executable with instant startup and minimal resource footprint.
	• Cross-Platform Native Binaries: Native compilation for Windows, Linux, and macOS ensures consistent performance across all platforms.
	• Intuitive CLI Interface: Powered by PicoCLI framework for user-friendly command handling with colors, autocompletion, and subcommands.
	• Developer-Focused Features: Install, switch, and manage multiple Java versions with simple commands, PATH configuration, and global version control.

Inspired by popular version managers like SDKMAN! and pyenv, CapyVerse CLI demonstrates expertise in building modern CLI applications with ahead-of-time compilation, making it ideal for developers seeking efficient, dependency-free Java version management. [conversation_history:1]

name: Restaurant Management Frontend
description: A dynamic front-end application built using Flutter (Dart) to streamline restaurant operations through an intuitive user interface and responsive client-side logic.
largeDescription:
This Flutter-based web application serves as the front-end of a restaurant management system, delivering seamless interaction and real-time responsiveness. It is designed to handle essential restaurant operations such as:

	• Order Processing: Streamlines order placement and tracking for efficient service.
	• Menu Management: Empowers staff to dynamically update menu items and categories.
	• Customer Interaction: Provides user-centric interfaces to enhance the dining experience.

With a responsive layout and clean component architecture, the project emphasizes performance, user experience, and integration readiness with backend systems. It showcases your ability to design scalable Flutter applications tailored to real-world operational needs.

name: Restaurant Management Backend
description: A robust Java-based backend service powering restaurant operations through secure RESTful APIs and modular business logic.
largeDescription:
This repository houses the backend infrastructure for a restaurant management system, fully developed in Java. It delivers a suite of RESTful APIs and implements core functionalities essential for smooth restaurant workflows, including:

	• Order Lifecycle Management: Handles order creation, updates, and tracking.
	• Menu & Inventory APIs: Facilitates real-time updates to menu items and stock levels.
	• Authentication & Security: Enforces secure access and data protection across services.

The backend seamlessly integrates with the Flutter-based frontend and is engineered for scalability, efficient data handling, and maintainability. This project highlights your strengths in backend architecture, API design, and production-level implementation.

name: SwiftCafe
description: A Flutter-based mobile app for placing orders at SwiftCafe, designed to streamline the ordering experience with a clean and intuitive interface.
largeDescription:
SwiftCafe is a cross-platform mobile app built using Flutter, crafted to enhance the café-ordering experience. With intuitive navigation across authentication, home, and product detail screens, the app allows customers to:

	• Explore the menu and product details.
	• Customize their orders effortlessly.
	• Place orders with a smooth, responsive UI.

The project emphasizes simplicity, performance, and modern design, making it ideal for real-world customer-centric ordering solutions.

name: GreenHive
description: An intelligent greenhouse automation system powered by Dart, featuring real-time control, monitoring, and data visualization for optimized plant care.
largeDescription:
GreenHive is a smart greenhouse system designed to intelligently manage and automate key agricultural functions. Developed primarily in Dart (97.5%), with additional support from TypeScript (1.6%) and other technologies (0.9%), this project aims to:

	• Automate climate control and irrigation through sensor integration.
	• Provide real-time monitoring of environmental data like humidity, temperature, and soil moisture.
	• Enable intelligent decision-making with predictive logic for optimized plant growth.

With a focus on sustainability and agricultural innovation, GreenHive offers a mobile-friendly dashboard that empowers users to control greenhouse conditions remotely, making it ideal for modern smart farming ecosystems.
